hero.badge: Built by a Master Butcher & Head Chef
hero.subline: Culinse aggregates recipes from multiple top sources — filtered to your diet and allergies, with no ads and no paywalls.

howItWorks.title: How Culinse Works
howItWorks.subtitle: We bring the internet's best recipes to you — personalized, searchable, and shoppable.

steps.title: Search & Discover
steps.desc: Search millions of recipes from top food sites worldwide — all in one place.

steps.title: Save & Personalize
steps.desc: Save recipes you love. Culinse learns your taste and shows you more of what you like.

steps.title: Shop Instantly
steps.desc: Add all ingredients to your cart with one click. Delivered to your door.

cta.title: Start discovering recipes today.
cta.subtitle: Free forever. No subscription. Just great food, personalized for you.

about.heroSubtitle: Culinse was born out of a real frustration — spending 20 minutes visiting site after site, just to find one decent recipe for dinner.

values.title: Craft
values.desc: Built by someone who has spent years behind the stove and the counter.

values.title: Passion
values.desc: Food is more than fuel. Culinse is for people who actually love to cook.

values.title: Simplicity
values.desc: No ads, no subscriptions, no clutter. Just recipes you'll want to make.

visionItems.title: Weekly Meal Planner
visionItems.desc: Plan your whole week in minutes. Culinse picks recipes that match your diet, schedule, and what's already in your fridge.

visionItems.title: Smart Shopping Lists
visionItems.desc: Auto-generate a shopping list from your weekly plan — or send it directly to your favorite grocery delivery service.

visionItems.title: Recipe Albums
visionItems.desc: Curate your own collections and share them with friends, family, or the world.

visionItems.title: Everything in One Place
visionItems.desc: One platform. Every recipe. No more browser tabs. From quick weeknight dinners to ambitious weekend projects.

login.title: Sign in to Culinse
login.subtitle: Save recipes, plan meals, and get personalized recommendations.
login.noAccount: No account needed — signing up is automatic.
